description: COALESCE infers the type from the first argument and literal default makes it non-nullable

columns.name: age
columns.note: type from first arg (integer), non-nullable due to literal default 0

name: coalesce_type_inference
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserAge
-- @returns :one
SELECT COALESCE(age, 0) AS age FROM users WHERE id = $1
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
